content.en:
In the following days, in addition to helping the development of the human race, Ye Tian spent the rest of his time in retreat and cultivation.

Although the human race is weak, it has the relationship with Ye Tian, which is equivalent to having the Void Heaven Temple as a backer, so it is very comfortable to mix in the big universe, and countless earth-level powerhouses have been born, and the god general level has also appeared one by one.

In addition, the human race has also given birth to several Heavenly Monarchs, but they are only the weakest kind of Heavenly Monarchs.

And Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu had no hope of detachment, so after using Ye Tian's countless resources to become a four-star god general, they began to impact the realm of the Mandate of Heaven.

With Ye Tian's help, the two of them almost succeeded 100% and became the Heavenly Monarch powerhouse of the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

In the blink of an eye, it will be 100,000 years later.

At this moment, Ye Tian had successfully cultivated the ten Chaos Divine Powers one by one, condensed the prototype of the Great Dao, and made his foundation of the prototype of the Great Dao stronger and more stable.

"Next, start to engrave the Dao pattern to make the Void Heaven Dao Body even stronger!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Originally, he had already engraved 22 patterns, and immediately began to engrave the 23rd pattern.

Under the guidance of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian is now more handy in inscribed Dao patterns, it took 10,000 years to engrave a Dao pattern before, but now it can be successfully engraved in 3,000 years.

Under Ye Tian's unremitting efforts, the patterns were successfully inscribed.

Article 23!

Article 24!

Article 25!

Article 26!

......

Every time a Dao pattern is successfully inscribed, Ye Tian's strength is stronger, and ten rudiments of the Great Dao have been added before, making Ye Tian's Endless Dao rudiments stronger, so his strength has increased very quickly, and he is not far from the mid-stage god of the Nine Stars.

When Ye Tian engraved the 30th Dao pattern, the Void Heaven Dao Body completely led to a great transformation.

At this moment, Ye Tian suddenly had some enlightenment.

His Void Heaven Dao body is small!

Originally, there was no entry and Xiao Cheng in the Void Heaven Dao Body, and practicing the Void Heaven Dao Body was the entry, but others simply couldn't engrave so many Dao patterns like him, so they were always at the entry level, and they didn't know that there was Xiao Cheng at all.

But Ye Tian now knows that the inscription of 30 Dao patterns is the Void Heaven Dao Body Xiaocheng.

The Void Heaven Dao Body was small, and Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, and he instantly stepped into the ranks of the mid-nine-star god generals.

The Tower of the God of War.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden had just stepped into the ranks of the eight-star late-stage god generals, and she was very happy, when she suddenly got the news about Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi has stepped into the middle stage of the Nine Stars, and the god will !!!"

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden couldn't believe it.

Nine-star mid-stage god generals, not many people in the entire chaos can step in, such as the God of War Tower, among the previous true legends, there are not many nine-star god generals, let alone nine-star mid-stage god generals.

"How could it be so fast, the last time Wanfa Daozi used the strength increase brought by the ninth-order life level to step into the early stage of the nine-star god general, he should have exhausted his potential, but now how can he quickly enter the middle stage of the nine star god general. If he continues to develop at this rate, after a million years, he is not expected to enter the ranks of the nine-star peak god generals!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden was shocked.

Nine-Star Peak Divine General, that is also her goal, and even according to her estimates, it may take hundreds of millions of years for her to be able to enter that level, or even longer.

Compared to Ye Tian, her progress was too slow.

"Anyway, only by entering the Nine-Star Divine General can we hope to catch up with the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi!"

The Goddess of Yun Zi dived into retreat again.

And Ye Tian still worked hard to engrave the Dao pattern, and 30 Dao patterns were far from his limit.

The 31st road pattern is engraved successfully!

The 32nd stripe is engraved successfully!

......

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's Void Heaven Dao Body possessed 42 Dao patterns.

At the same time, Ye Tian's strength was also among the top among the mid-nine-star god generals, but he only belonged to the second place on the god general list, because there was another person who was a late nine-star god general.

Originally, that person was only in the middle of the Nine Stars, but due to the achievement of the ninth order life level in the Innate Origin Pool, his strength increased greatly, and he stepped into the ranks of the late Nine Star Divine Generals.

Ye Tian thought that it would take a long time for him to surpass the person who was number one on the Divine General List, but he didn't expect that it didn't take long for this person to reach the Heavenly Mandate Realm and become a Heavenly Monarch.

Therefore, Ye Tian officially became the first on the list of god generals.

Ye Tian didn't care much about this ranking, he could be regarded as having entered the first place on the list of gods several times, it was useless to go up and down, and his strength was still the most real.

"There are 42 Dao Patterns, but it is still far from the Void Heaven Dao Body Dacheng, I don't know how many Dao Patterns are needed to practice the Void Heaven Dao Body to Dacheng?" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Right now, all the Chaos Divine Powers in his hands have been cultivated, and there is no new Chaos Divine Power inheritance.

There are still some Chaos Divine Power inheritances on the Void Heaven Temple system, but it is relatively expensive, and he does not have many points now, so he is not ready to exchange it, even if he exchanges one or two Chaos Divine Powers, it will not be useful.

I'm afraid that even the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor didn't expect that his cultivation speed would be so fast.

"Let's cultivate a great divine power to the extreme level first, the other nine-star divine generals basically have an extreme great divine power, and I have become a mid-nine-star divine general, but I don't even have an extreme great divine power, it's too embarrassing!"

Suddenly, Ye Tian began to comprehend the Great Divine Power with all his might.

Great Immortality!

Doom!

Constant light!

These three great supernatural powers were all at the peak realm of Dacheng, and they were only one step away from the consummation realm, so Ye Tian was the first to comprehend these three supernatural powers.

With the assistance of the god-level transcendent comprehension talent, coupled with Ye Tian's achievement of the ninth-order life level, the soul has transformed, and the basic comprehension has increased a lot, and with the addition of the Void Heaven Dao body Xiaocheng, the soul strength has increased greatly, and the comprehension has improved a lot.

Therefore, Ye Tian's current comprehension is definitely above that of the Cloud Purple Goddess.

Tens of thousands of years later, the Great Immortal Technique, the Great Destruction Technique, and the Constant Light Divine Power have all stepped into the realm of consummation.

After that, Ye Tian specialized in comprehending the Great Immortal Technique, once he practiced the Great Immortal Technique at the extreme level, Ye Tian's life-preserving ability and defense ability were extremely exaggerated, and it was difficult to die.

And this comprehension took Ye Tian 300,000 years, which shows how difficult it is to comprehend the Great Immortal Technique at the extreme level.

The Great Immortal Technique has been raised to the extreme level, and Ye Tian's strength has improved a lot, but he still hasn't stepped into the late stage of the Nine Stars, but the gap is not big.

As a result, Ye Tian began to comprehend the Hengguang Divine Power again, the difficulty of this great divine power was slightly smaller, and Ye Tian had a new understanding of the extreme divine power, and the difficulty of comprehension was reduced a little.

After 200,000 years, Ye Tian raised the Constant Light Divine Power to the extreme level.

After another 210,000 years, Ye Tian successfully raised the Great Destruction Technique to the extreme level.

With the three ultimate divine powers in hand, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed again, and he instantly stepped into the ranks of the late nine-star god generals.
